response.overview: A documentary that follows individuals who step away from expected life trajectories in search of meaning, freedom, and self-determination. Through an intimate and observational approach, the film traces personal journeys shaped by decisive choices—leaving behind familiar environments, careers, or identities to pursue uncertain but deeply personal paths. As the protagonists navigate new landscapes and confront the consequences of their decisions, the documentary reflects on themes of independence, resilience, and the courage required to live authentically. Blending travel, reflection, and encounters along the way, the film becomes both a physical and emotional exploration of what it means to choose a life less defined by convention and more by individual conviction.
response.title: A Road Less Travelled
